narrative:
Huber Heights 3-E (precinct in Montgomery County) has 952 registered voters, with 65.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
